# URAI Content PR Checklist

## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:
- Related roadmap/version:

## Checks

- [ ] npm ci
- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run typecheck
- [ ] npm run validate:content
- [ ] npm run validate:sprites
- [ ] npm run content:index
- [ ] git diff --exit-code
- [ ] npm run smoke
- [ ] npm test
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] npm run seed:check
- [ ] npm run done

## Package coverage

- [ ] Schemas updated when needed
- [ ] Seed data updated when needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Public exports updated from src/index.ts when needed
- [ ] Docs updated when needed

## Release truth

- [ ] This PR only claims completed work that was actually implemented and verified
- [ ] Remaining blockers are documented
- [ ] External runtime work is clearly separated from package work

## Notes

Add command output, CI links, screenshots, or deployment URLs when available.
